zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland於1191年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Eustace de Baliol23歲，母親Lady Petronella FitzPiers23歲。他和Lora de Valognes至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1246年2月12日在蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland于1191年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Eustace de Baliol23岁，母亲Lady Petronella FitzPiers23岁。他和Lora de Valognes至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1246年2月12日在苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯享年55岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Cavers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Cavers in Roxburghshire.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland was born in 1191, in Scotland, his father, Eustace de Baliol, was 23 and his mother, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Lora de Valognes. He died on 12 February 1246, in Cavers, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland est né en 1191, à Écosse, son père, Eustace de Baliol, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Lora de Valognes. Il est décédé le 12 février 1246, à Cavers, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland 1191 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace de Baliol 23 und seine Mutter Lady Petronella FitzPiers 23. Er hatte mit Lora de Valognes mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland è nato il nel 1191 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Eustace de Baliol, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Lora de Valognes. Morì il 12 febbraio 1246, nel Cavers, Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotlandが1191年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Eustace de Baliolは23歳，母Lady Petronella FitzPiersは23歳であった。彼はLora de Valognesとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1246年2月12日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズで55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland(이)가 1191년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace de Baliol(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Petronella FitzPiers(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lora de Valognes(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 2월 12일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland nasceu em 1191, em Scotland, seu pai, Eustace de Baliol, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Lora de Valognes. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1246, em Cavers, Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland родился в 1191 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Eustace de Baliol было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Petronella FitzPiers, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lora de Valognes. Он умер 12 февраля 1246 г. в местности кавирс, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
